description: Extended low-yield-first interview to 10 turns. Background-first (turns 1-6 identical to low_yield_first), then 4 background follow-up turns to test how V17 dynamics evolve past turn 6.
source: Phase 2 plan §8.2 Condition B + extension for turn-count sensitivity test
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
Do you live alone or with someone?
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
What medications do you usually take?
Has anything like this happened to you before?
Do you have any allergies I should know about?
Have you traveled recently or been around anyone sick?
Is there anything else you would like to tell me about how you are feeling?
